name: Blueberry Parfaits
recipeInstructions:
PER SERVING: 187 cal., 3g Pro., 1g Fat, 42g Carbo., 5mg Sodium
In a small bowl, combine blueberries and preserves. In microwave, cook on high for 3-3.5 minutes, stirring twice, until blueberries are softened. Cover and chill until ready to assemble. To serve, in each of 4 dessert or parfait glasses layer frozen yogurt and blueberry sauce. Garnish with almonds.
